Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 16GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1650
content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i5 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 4GB NVIDIA GTX 1650
  • 16GB DDR3 RAM
  • 19" Refurbished Monitor

Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 16GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1650 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Ram: 16GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 4GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT FLASH RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i5
  • RAM: 16GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i3 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660

Refurbished (Intel i3 2nd Gen, 8GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i3 2nd Gen

Ram: 8GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT BLITZ RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i3
  • RAM: 8GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

Refurbished (Intel i3 2nd Gen, 8GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660
content:
Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i3 2nd Gen
  • 2TB SATA Hard Drive
  • 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660
  • 8GB DDR3 RAM
  • 19" Refurbished Monitor

Refurbished (Intel i3 2nd Gen, 8GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1660 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i3 2nd Gen

Ram: 8GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 6GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1660

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT BLITZ RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • Processor: Intel i3
  • RAM: 8GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB
  • Keywords: Gaming

Case: CS Twin RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

Features

  • RAM: 16GB
  • Graphics: Nvidia GeForce
  • SSD/HDD: HDD
  • Total Storage: 1001-2000GB

LEGO 71796 Ninjago Elemental Dragon Vs. The Empress Mech
content:
Description & Details

LEGO 71796 Ninjago Elemental Dragon Vs. The Empress Mech Description

Ninja fans aged 9+ can recreate an epic showdown from the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV series with Elemental Dragon vs. The Empress Mech (71796). The building set features fearsome dragon Jiro, who can be upgraded by adding golden blade wings and stud shooters from a flyer vehicle to take on the Empress's posable golden mech, who is wielding a large sword. The impressive playset includes 6 minifigures. Jay, Sora and Zane each come with 2 golden katanas to defeat the trio of Lord Ras with his hammer, Empress Beatrix with her Imperium sword and an Imperium Guard with a staff. There's also a yellow dragon power element for the characters to battle over, and kids can collect 4 more in different colors and 4 golden dragon energy core elements in other NINJAGO sets. Let the LEGO Builder app guide you and your child on an easy and intuitive building adventure. Zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track your progress.

Description & Details

Summary

  • Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Refurbished (Intel i5 2nd Gen, 8GB DDR 3) ULTRA FAST i3 i5 i7 Desktop Gaming PC 2TB 16GB NVIDIA GTX 1650 Description

Operating System: Windows 10 64-Bit

Processor: Intel Core i5 2nd Gen

Ram: 8GB DDR3

Hard Drive: 2TB SATA Hard Drive

Optical Drive: Not Included

Graphics Card: 4GB NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1650

Graphic Card Ports: HDMI, DVI, Display Port

Screen: 19'' Refurbished TFT (Brand and Model Will Vary)

Keyboard & Mouse: Included

Case: CiT FLASH RGB

WIFI: USB Wi-Fi

Power Supply: 600W Standard Power Supply


 

WHAT WILL COME IN THE BUNDLE:

  1. Gaming PC x1
  2. Gaming Keyboard and Mouse x1
  3. Power lead x2
  4. VGA monitor lead x1
  5. Refurbished 19" Monitor x1.

Software:

Adobe Acrobat Reader DC - The leading PDF Viewer for reliably viewing, printing, signing and commenting on PDF documents. 

AnyDesk - A remote desktop support application that ensures secure and reliable remote desktop connections for our customer support where you may need it. Please note: You will need to generate and provide an ID for our customer support team to make a connection; this application does not allow us to connect without your consent. 

BullGuard Anti-Virus Premium internet security with Game Booster - BullGuard Internet Security delivers complete protection for your devices. BullGuard's Game Booster optimizes online games with an anti-cheat engine and even improves your video-streaming. It's the Internet Security for the gamers, and why we have installed a complimentary 90 day license on your new machine. 

CCleaner - Optimize, clean, protect and inject instant speed into your machine by removing the unnecessary files taking up room on your hard drive. Clear out errors and broken settings to improve stability. Boost your browser and help protect your privacy by securely erasing tracking cookies and history. Google Chrome - A safe, speedy and secure web browser to suit all your web browsing needs.

WARRANTY & CONDITION:

“Our gaming PCs are made USING BRAND NEW COMPONENTS EXCLUDING THE MOTHERBOARD AND CPU and come pre-installed with a Genuine Windows 10 64-Bit license. This item is built/tested/cleaned on-site by our team of highly skilled engineers and fully functional as intended. All Gaming PC's will come with 12 months warranty with a Computer Specialist.”

PLEASE NOTE:

  • No Games are included or installed on the system 
  • Please ensure that you have checked that the computer is suitable to play the games you want, as Computer Specialist will not be held liable. If you are unsure, Please message us the Game you wish to play and the specifications copied into the message and we will cross check for you. 
  • PRODUCT DOES NOT HAVE INTERNAL SPEAKERS
  • USB 3.0 DOES NOT WORK AS MOTHERBOARD SUPPORTS USB 2.0
  • Only expect the performance on a level to the components themsleves.
  • Free WiFi Dongle provided to enable WiFi onto the computer. Please note if streaming or gaming online we recommend upgrading the dongle or connecting by Ethernet cable.
  • Monitor: Brand will vary on stock
  • Monitor Type - Sqaure or Wide screen (DEPEND ON STOCK)
  • Monitor Colour -Black, Silver, Grey,
  • Monitor Condition - Grade A - Refurbished.

content:
Description & Details

LEGO 31139 Creator Cosy House Description

Kids will be thrilled to play out fun-filled stories with this impressive LEGO Creator 3 in 1 Cosy House (31139) building toy. It's time to enjoy the good life with 3 different impressive LEGO houses models in 1 set. Each one of these house models can be adjusted and played with in 2 positions. The set also comes with 3 LEGO minifigures (2 adults and 1 child). Kids have the choice of creating 3 different LEGO houses with this brilliant model building kit. It features a family model house with 4 rooms: a kitchen, living room, master bedroom and child's bedroom, plus a garden terrace. The house folds open in the middle to give kids even more play options. When it's time for a change, kids can rebuild it into a 3-floor LEGO canal house with an attic office, an art gallery and café, or make a holiday lake house on the water with a boat. For a fun build experience, download the LEGO Builder app and step into a new world of building fun where kids can zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track their progress.
